key.name: effect-type
key.description: Choose the particle effect to display: sparkles, confetti, smoke, explosion, or rainbow

key.name: enabled-apps
key.description: Comma-separated list of app names, or 'all' for all apps except browsers

key.name: browser-blacklist
key.description: Comma-separated list of additional app patterns to exclude (e.g., 'firefox,chromium')
